title: IIT Hyderabad – Senior Project Manager – 1 Posts
shortInfo: Indian Institute of Technology Hyderabad (IIT Hyderabad) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Senior Project Manager. Candidates with Ph.D Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 07-05-2026, and closes on 28-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Hyderabad official website https://iith.ac.in/.
